_comment: CTK-086 Session 2 — Q-4 fixture for parse_shopify._should_keep tag_allowlist extension. Three synthetic Shopify-shaped products exercising tag_allowlist hit (product_type='' + ['Coral', ...] tags — RC-shape) / tag_allowlist miss (product_type='' + ['Fish', ...] tags — RC fish-bucket leak shape) / cross-axis interaction (tag_allowlist hit + tag_denylist hit — denylist short-circuit). product_type='' across all three mirrors Reef Chasers' empty-product_type universal canon per CTK-086 plan §Decisions Q-2.

products.title: Synthetic Coral with denylist tag — denylist short-circuit
